allow: Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title ""feat\(explore\): debounce, infinite scroll, trending, error handling"" --body ""## Summary\\n\\n- Search debounce 300ms: results update automatically while typing, no need to press Enter\\n- Infinite scroll: browse loads 20 diaries per page instead of a fixed 50 limit\\n- Trending section: horizontal scrollable row of top 10 most-liked diaries, shown above the grid when not searching\\n- Fix empty state: distinct message for empty browse vs no search results\\n- Error handling: Alert shown when browse fetch fails \(was previously silent\)\\n- Add 4 i18n keys in EN and IT: explore.trending, explore.all_diaries, explore.empty_browse, explore.error_fetch\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Open Explore tab: trending section appears above the grid\\n- [ ] Type in search bar: results update automatically after 300ms without pressing Enter\\n- [ ] Clear search: returns to browse mode with trending visible\\n- [ ] Scroll to bottom of browse: next page loads automatically\\n- [ ] Verify empty browse state shows correct message \(not the search error message\)\\n- [ ] Simulate network error on browse fetch: Alert appears\\n\\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)""")
